name: Shoonya Shikhar Gurukulam
tagline: Where Ancient Wisdom Meets Modern Learning
description: A traditional Indian Gurukulam dedicated to holistic education through Yoga, Meditation, Martial Arts, Sanskrit, and Modern Sciences.
vision: To nurture individuals who embody the wisdom of ancient Indian traditions while being equipped to contribute meaningfully to the modern world.
mission: To provide a holistic education that integrates spiritual growth, physical discipline, intellectual development, and moral values in a serene and nurturing environment.
